creator: timur.bakeyev@gmail.com
text:
That looks weird... Are you sure you have all the ports tree up-to-date?

/usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient # pkg info -d samba36-libsmbclient-3.6.16
samba36-libsmbclient-3.6.16:
        python27-2.7.5_1
        tevent-0.9.18
        talloc-2.0.8
        libexecinfo-1.1_3
        gettext-0.18.1.1_1
        tdb-1.2.12,1
        libiconv-1.14_1


/usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient # make run-depends-list
/usr/ports/converters/libiconv
/usr/ports/databases/tdb
/usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo
/usr/ports/devel/talloc
/usr/ports/devel/tevent
